name: No-Cholesterol Fruit-Filled Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (High-altitude: 425°F). Grease a 12-cup muffin tin or line with paper baking cups.
2. In a medium bowl, combine milk, oil, and egg product until blended. Stir in Bisquick baking mix, sugar, and fruit preserves until just moistened.
3. Spoon the batter evenly into the prepared muffin cups. Add about one level teaspoon of fruit preserves to the center of each cup.
4. Bake for 13-18 minutes or until golden brown. Allow the muffins to cool slightly before removing from the pan. Drizzle with glaze.
5. To make the glaze, whisk powdered sugar and water in a small bowl until smooth.
